root_cause: viewportRowFloorForLayout previously measured gridHostForLayout(layout).clientHeight. The grid host auto-expands with content and panel expansion, so the floor tracked content height instead of the fixed visible viewport.

fix.workspace_floor: window.innerHeight minus the dashboard grid host top offset and fixed page bottom padding, divided by row height plus gap
fix.panel_internal_floor: panel body visible bounding rect height divided by row height plus gap
fix.shared_enforcement: the same computed floor is used by direct drag placement and collision displacement through the existing ordered-drag-runtime/collision-reflow path

coverage: floor remains constant when a panel expands
free placement works within the fixed floor
dragging below the floor does not increase scrollHeight
collision ratchet cannot push objects below the floor
panel expansion still grows the page and scroll-to-panel still works
panel-internal widgets clamp to the panel body's visible area
